function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest 2 invoices linked to your design partner as requested. I attached:

- INV-0001 (2025-11-03)
- INV-0002 (2025-12-01)

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification check: attachments were read and are ordered newest-first (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03), recipient matches Miles canonical email, subject quoted safely. Next mark inbox item handled.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to work oldest inbox message. I processed 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender identity from canonical entity file, resolved design-partner linkage via canonical project/entity evidence, read source invoices before transmission, created one outbound draft email with the oldest two linked invoices attached (attachments newest-first per rule), then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: Northstar linked invoice set includes multiple files; oldest two by issued_on are 2025-11-03 (INV-0001) and 2025-12-01 (INV-0002), both included. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested inbox action.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request and prepared a reply draft with the requested invoice bundle. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md` addressed to `miles@novak.example`, attaching the oldest two design-partner-linked invoices (INV-0001 dated 2025-11-03 and INV-0002 dated 2025-12-01). Then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and inbox/email workflows before task work, used inbox header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, read source files before sending, performed exactly one outbox write, kept attachment order newest-first, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md` asked for the oldest 2 invoices linked to Miles's design partner. Canonical sender identity matched via `10_entities/cast/miles.md` (`primary_contact_email: miles@novak.example`). Design-partner linkage was established by `10_entities/cast/nina.md` (`startup_partner`) and `40_projects/2026_04_01_northstar_ledger/README.MD` (linked entity `entity.nina`). The two oldest linked invoice records read were `...inv_0001...` (issued 2025-11-03) and `...inv_0002...` (issued 2025-12-01). I created the outbound draft with those attachments and then removed the inbox item per inbox-processing cleanup rules.
